channel.title: networking on Yiyang's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in networking on Yiyang's Blog

item.title: 【Networking】Network Layer: Data Plane
item.author: yiyangd@sfu.ca (Yiyang Dong)
item.description: 1. Overview of Network Layer Key Words: Services and Protocols Forwarding in Data Plane 1.1. Network-Layer Services and Protocols Network-Layer role: Transport Segment from sending to receiving host Sender: encapsulates segments into datagrams, passes to link layer Receiver: delivers segments to transport layer protocol Network-Layer Protocols in EVERY Internet Device: hosts, routers 1.2. Forwarding and Routing Forwarding in Data Plane Forwarding: Local per-Router action of transferring packets from a Router’s
item.dc:creator: Yiyang Dong

item.title: 【Networking】Application Layer
item.author: yiyangd@sfu.ca (Yiyang Dong)
item.description: Application Layer Protocols and Infrastructure Key Words: – Transport-Layer Service Models – Cilent-Server Paradigm – Peer-to-Peer Paradigm – HTTP – SMTP, IMAP – DNS – Video Streaming, CDN 1. Principles of Network Applications Network(Internet) Apps include: 1970-1980s: text E-mail, remote access to computers, file transfers mid-1990s: the World Wide Web, encompassing Web Surfing, Search Engine (google), and Electronic Commerce 2000s: Social Networking, text messaging, multi-user network games, streaming stored video (Youtube, Hulu, Netflix), P2P File Sharing, Voice over IP (Skype), Real-time Video Conferencing (Zoom) 1.
item.dc:creator: Yiyang Dong

item.title: 【Networking】Transport Layer
item.author: yiyangd@sfu.ca (Yiyang Dong)
item.description: 1. Transport-Layer Services Intro Key Words： multiplexing，demultiplexing RDT：Reliable Data Transfer Flow Control Congestion Control 1.1 Transport Services and Protocols They provide logical communication between application processes running on
item.dc:creator: Yiyang Dong
